description_long: This is a rectangular wooden storage box constructed from horizontal slats with visible grain and a natural brown finish. The box features open slats on all sides, allowing for ventilation and visibility of contents, and has cut-out handholds on the shorter sides for easy carrying. The wood appears to be lightly stained, with some minor imperfections and natural texture, giving it a rustic, utilitarian look. The box is open-topped, with no lid or cover, and the interior is spacious, suitable for holding various items. Small metal fasteners are visible at the joints, reinforcing the structure. This type of box is commonly used for storage or transport in urban environments such as markets, garages, or workshops.
description: A rustic, open-topped wooden storage box with horizontal slats and cut-out side handles, finished in a natural brown tone.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide face with three horizontal wooden slats and no visible handles.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the cut-out handhold and the open slat design, emphasizing the box's depth.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, with three horizontal slats and no handles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the cut-out handhold and open slats, mirroring view 1.
